name: IRC_CX_COOKIES_TL
description: Site cookie messages translated settings. Cookie message can by only one per site.

columns.Name: COOKIE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the cookie. System generated value.

columns.Name: COOKIE_LINK_LABEL
columns.Comments: Cookie Link Label

columns.Name: PREFERENCES_BUTTON_LABEL
columns.Comments: Cookie Preferences Button Label

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: PREFERENCES_SAVE_BUTTON_LABEL
columns.Comments: Cookie Preferences Save Button Label

columns.Name: STRICT_CATEGORY_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Description for Strictly Necessary Cookie Category

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ANALYTICAL_CATEGORY_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Description for Analytical Cookie Category

columns.Name: FUNCTIONAL_CATEGORY_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Description for Functional Cookie Category

columns.Name: CUSTOM_CATEGORY_BUTTON_LABEL
columns.Comments: Custom Category Button Label

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description for Custom Cookie Category

columns.Name: POP_UP_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Column containing translatable cookie popup message.

columns.Name: POLICY_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Column containing translatable cookie policy message site.

columns.Name: ACCEPT_BUTTON_LABEL
columns.Comments: Column containing translatable label of accept button.

columns.Name: DECLINE_BUTTON_LABEL
columns.Comments: Column containing translatable label of decline button

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
